papers.title: DynamoLLM (HPCA 2025)
papers.problem: Dynamic resource allocation for LLM inference
papers.objective: Minimize cost while meeting latency SLAs
papers.algorithm: Offline GPU efficiency profiling + online greedy allocation
papers.assumption_mismatch: Profiled efficiency curve = trace-specific prior; Erlang-C is already assumption-free theoretical model
papers.reason: Erlang-C already theoretically sound; profiled curve would be a calculated prior

papers.title: Llumnix (OSDI 2024)
papers.problem: Live migration of LLM requests across serving instances
papers.objective: Reduce tail latency, improve resource utilization
papers.algorithm: Monitor queue lengths; migrate to less-loaded instances

papers.title: Preble (NSDI 2024)
papers.algorithm: Track prefix hashes; route to replicas with matching cached prefixes
papers.assumption_mismatch: BurstGPT has no session IDs; cache savings already capped at MAX_PREFILL_SAVINGS=0.25 in benchmark
papers.reason: Already approximated by cache_affinity_baseline; no additional gain without session data

research_review.summary: All three reviewed papers address problems already covered by existing Aurelius policies or require new modules prohibited by the Five-Failure Rule. No new implementation warranted.

bottleneck_analysis.question: What is currently preventing Aurelius from achieving another real +25% against the strongest fair baseline?
bottleneck_analysis.answer: The replica-scaling domain (Azure/BurstGPT serving) is at 94.4% of oracle ceiling (OSOTSS +5.94% vs AMCSG vs oracle +6.29%). The BurstGPT 15-request SLA gap is structurally irreducible (stochastic/deterministic mismatch at minimum-capacity ticks, confirmed by multi-seed audit). The next +25% must come from a different workload/decision domain or from Phase 1b combination search.
bottleneck_analysis.blocking_factor: Phase 1b replay loop unification required to enable combination search across workload types

next_actions.description: Collapse energy + serving + genai replay loops into one engine to enable combination search
next_actions.expected_gain: Enables energy+serving combination; unknown KPI delta

next_actions.description: Test GenAI policy with configurable EWMA alpha (0.1-0.9) to find principled alpha selection rule
next_actions.expected_gain: Potentially +1-5% on GenAI KPI; risk of trace-specific tuning

next_actions.description: Promote frontier BASE/DYNAMIC to hard rho-ceiling constraint in AureliusOptimizer
